easy.title: Temperature Converter
easy.description: Write a function that converts Celsius to Fahrenheit.

medium.title: String Utilities
medium.description: Write functions: reverse a string, check palindrome, count vowels.
hints: A palindrome reads the same forward and backward

hard.title: Function Pipeline
hard.description: Create a compose/pipeline function that chains multiple functions together, passing each result to the next.
hints: Functions execute from right to left in compose
Each function receives the previous result

debugging.title: Debug the Function
debugging.description: The following java code has bugs. Find and fix them.
bugs: Missing return statement — function returns None/undefined
